overview: A single-page responsive website for CoolCare Services, an AC repair business. Mobile-first design focused on generating customer bookings via WhatsApp, with a clean blue/white/grey cooling aesthetic.
features: Hero section with Call Now and WhatsApp CTA buttons
Service cards for AC Installation, Repair, Gas Refilling, Maintenance, and Cleaning
Why Choose Us section with 5 trust-building benefits
Contact info with clickable phone number, address, and working hours
Floating Book Service button with popup booking form
WhatsApp integration with auto-filled booking message
Mobile-first responsive layout with smooth scrolling and animations
